sglang.title: Improve benchmark
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add a new document docs/en/benchmark_and_profiling.md
Remove the deprecated benchmark script benchmark/latency_throughput. We should all use sglang.bench_serving and sglang.bench_latency

vllm.title: [Model] Pipeline parallel support for JAIS
vllm.author: mrbesher
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PP support for jais
Tested on "inceptionai/jais-family-590m" with pp=2 tp=1 in the following environment:
- Platform: Linux-6.5.0-21-generic-x86_64-with-glibc2.35
- Python version: 3.10.14
- Numpy version: 1.26.4
- PyTorch version (GPU?): 2.4.0+cu121 (True)
- System RAM: 251.53 GB
- GPU type: NVIDIA

vllm.title: [VLM] Refactor `MultiModalConfig` initialization and profiling
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously we initialize MultiModalConfig for all models regardless of whether or not the model itself is multi-modal. This can cause some developer confusion, especially since we're going to use this class for multimodal models starting #7126.
This PR refactors the logic and make MultiModalConfig a

vllm.title: [TPU] Skip creating empty tensor
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the TPU backend creates empty TPU tensors for WorkerInput, causing unnecessary overhead. This PR removes this.
